data.body: When _phase_version_bump's git commit --amend fails (e.g., test gate or review gate blocks it), state_mark_complete is never called. On the next --resume, the idempotency check fails to detect the already-bumped version because the comparison baseline (origin/main) hasn't been pushed yet, so it bumps again. Fix: the idempotency check should compare against the pre-merge SHA recorded by _state_record_merge_sha, not origin/main.
